title: Silly Cat Textures
description: A texture pack that originally just changed the sun texture, but will soon change many more to be silly cats!
body:
### Version 2.0 out NOW!

(hi, i dont really know what else to do with this old project but, thanks lol? ^^)

A texture pack that originally just changed the sun texture, but now changes the moon phases to also be silly! And there may be a secret silly cat somewhere else... :)

ty for the silly amount of support on this lol!
